title: Fix the birthday invitation
drDigitalIntro:
Time for a real challenge!
• A messy birthday invitation just showed up in your Files app.
• It has misspelled words, wrong details, and rambling sentences.
• Open it, go full screen, and fix it using only the keyboard.

playgroundTask.instructions: Fix the invitation: correct the spelling, delete the extra sentence that repeats the title, straighten out the Date/Time/Location so each label matches its real value, and trim the rambling ending down to one closing sentence. Then click Check my work.
playgroundTask.startingText:
Your Invitatoin too Dr. Digeetul Birthday!!

Please joim us four a birthdy celebretion honering Dr. Digital.

Date: Moonstone Medical Plaza, 742 Rainbow Avenue
Time: Saturday, October 8, 2026
Location: 3:30 PM – 6:30 PM, Cloud Ctiy

There will be pizza cake, games and music plenty of fun. Pleese RSVP by October 17 so we know how many guest's to expect. Freinds and family are welcom. We hop you can special celebrate this join us occasion! Don't forgte bring your birthday smile, becuase cake the will be huge. everyone after arrive before, presents open we will. See you their soon hopefully! We cant wait too celabrate with all of are favorite pepole.
playgroundTask.correctText:
You're Invited to Dr. Digital's Birthday!

Please join us for a birthday celebration honoring Dr. Digital.

Date: Saturday, October 17, 2026
Time: 3:30 PM – 6:30 PM
Location: Moonstone Medical Plaza, 742 Rainbow Avenue, Cloud City

There will be pizza, cake, games and music. Please RSVP by October 8 so we know how many guests to expect. Friends and family are welcome. We hope you can join us to celebrate this special occasion!
mustInclude: You're Invited to Dr. Digital's Birthday!
Location: Moonstone Medical Plaza, 742 Rainbow Avenue, Cloud City
We hope you can join us to celebrate this special occasion

drDigitalSuccess: Wonderful editing! You fixed it all without touching the mouse.
drDigitalHint: The title should read "You're Invited to Dr. Digital's Birthday!" and the whole next sentence can be deleted — it just repeats the title. The Date, Time, and Location labels are all matched to the wrong values — Date should be October 17, Time is 3:30–6:30 PM, and Location is the address plus Cloud City. RSVP is due October 8. And everything after "Friends and family are welcome" can be replaced with one short closing sentence.
